description: CompositionBlack and red plaid check shirt made of 100% cotton, with full sleeves, full button placket, curved hemline, pocket on left chest and a discreet brand tag attached to itWash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened Preferably hand washed Use only mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Flat dry Preferably steam iron This black and red plaid check shirt from scullers is a great addition to your wardrobe.  The bold black and red combo works well and gives off an energetic vibe. Pair this shirt with denims or chinos and semi-formal leather shoes for a cool casual look.Size and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size 40
